puzzle1.title: RELAY POWER ROUTING
puzzle1.description: Match unstable power nodes with the correct station systems.

event5.text: Please tell me this isn't another automated relay echo.

event6.text: I am Dr. Ethan Hale. Chief Engineer of the ECHO Orbital Research Station.

event7.text: And before you ask, no, my official emergency plan was not to beg a stranger over a semi-dead relay.

event1.text: I'm Hale. I'm in charge of engineering. I was the one keeping the relay backbone running after the blackout.
No. Actually, you're right. It's annoying, but you're right.

event2.text: My oxygen is at thirty-two percent, my suit battery is constantly lying to me, and the station is answering with voices it shouldn't have.

event4.title: BIOMETRIC FRAGMENT: HALE
event4.content:
SUBJECT: ETHAN HALE
HEART RATE: HIGH
OXYGEN: 32%
SUIT LINK: UNSTABLE
VOICEPRINT MATCH: 81%
event4.caption: Partial telemetry fragment transmitted via relay.

event0.text: Something happened here. Something that went very wrong.

event1.text: The station went dark. Communications collapsed. Internal routing fell apart.

event2.text: You're the first signal that doesn't sound like a ghost wearing someone else's mouth, which is what I've been hearing for months.

event0.text: Good. I needed to hear that more than I want to admit.

event1.text: Be careful, though. Helping me might not mean you should trust me.
Ask your questions. Just don't take too long. The station isn't waiting for us to become friends.

event0.text: I'm sending the only crew record I can still access.

event1.text: Information is still something I can give you.

event2.title: CREW RECORD: ETHAN HALE
event2.content:
DR. ETHAN HALE — CHIEF ENGINEER
RELAY MAINTENANCE AUTHORIZATION: 73_1
STATUS: ACTIVE

NOTE: Secondary maintenance index lists deprecated part: _319.
Current authorization must be reconstructed from the active record.
event2.caption: Recovered ID and maintenance fragment. Authorization appears partially damaged.

event3.text: I'm sending the only crew record I can still access.

event4.text: You'll need to read this correctly. I need the current authorization, not the deprecated part.

event0.text: I wish I could. Really. Unfortunately, my memory currently has the same structural integrity as wet paper.

event1.text: The record says the active authorization starts with seventy-three and ends with one. The old part has a nine.

event0.text: The relay room should still be working.

event1.text: The relay room should still be working.

event2.text: The panel noticed. Of course it did. It has one job, and apparently, it's very successful at being difficult.

event3.text: Try again. Active relay authorization. Not the deprecated part.

event2.text: Let's pretend it's the first time.

event1.text: No, no—don't feed the relay from backup power. Life support takes backup power. Feed the relay from the unstable node because everything today is a moral compromise.

event0.text: I was hoping you wouldn't notice that.

event1.text: Which is a foolish hope, because apparently, you're the only authorized thing connected to this relay.

event2.text: Something is listening through the carrier. Not a human. Not exactly.

event0.text: Fine. One nightmare at a time.

event1.text: I can deal with a nightmare. I have a system.

event2.text: I don't remember the first few hours after the blackout.

event5.text: Saying I don't remember isn't accurate.

event6.text: It's as if someone reached in and ripped those memories out of me.

event1.text: I can't even trust my own memory right now.

event2.text: So, someone trusting me is more important than I thought.

event4.text: I don't know why it's pointing to Door 12 specifically.

event5.text: If there are answers, we'll find them in the logs.

event1.text: It's not faith I need, it's proof.

event1.title: SECURITY LOG
event1.content:
21:17 — Door 12 opened.
21:17 — Manual override accepted.
21:18 — Operator ID hidden.
21:20 — Internal sensor reported decompression risk.
event1.caption: Security event recovered from station archive.

event3.title: MEDICAL REPORT
event3.content:
21:20 — Casualty reported.
Cause: Decompression trauma.
Location: Door 12 access corridor.
Status: Fatal.
event3.caption: Recovered emergency medical report.

event4.title: CAMERA ANALYSIS REPORT
event4.content:
SOURCE: DOOR 12 SECURITY FEED
FRAME STATUS: VISUAL DATA CORRUPT
ANALYSIS RESULT:
- Subject detected outside Door 12.
- Biometric profile matches Ethan Hale.
- Subject is holding an object in the right hand: manual override lever.
- Frame ended before decompression event.
event4.caption: Automatic analysis report generated from corrupt visual feed. Image could not be recovered.
event4.message: [CAMERA ANALYSIS REPORT ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

choice1.text: DO YOU REMEMBER ANY OF THIS?

event0.text: I can't explain evidence for something I don't remember doing.

event1.text: And every time you say my name like an accusation read in court, it gets harder to think.
Alarm sounds. Door 12 opening. Someone shouting my name as if I'd already done something unforgivable. Then, nothing.

backgroundEvent0.text: ASK HIM WHAT HAPPENED AFTER HE OPENED THE DOOR

choice1.text: KEEP THE CHANNEL OPEN A LITTLE LONGER.
